message.content:
@startuml
participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "Sqoop" as Sqoop
participant "Metastore DB" as MetastoreDB
participant "HDFS" as HDFS
participant "Hive SQL" as HiveSQL
participant "Hive" as Hive
participant "Hive Table" as HiveTable
participant "Ambari" as Ambari

section "Pre Upgrade Planning Setup"
    Admin -> Sqoop : "Collect the Metadata"
    Sqoop -> MetastoreDB : Extracts from
    Sqoop -> HDFS : Saves to
    Admin -> Hive : Build Supporting Tables
end section

section "Pre Upgrade Planning"
    Admin -> Sqoop : Run "Distinct Serdes"
    Admin -> Hive : Fix Tables with Serde Issues
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Check Partition Location"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Non-Managed Table Locations"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Managed Table Locations"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Missing HDFS Directories Check"
    Admin -> Hive : Correct "Missing Directories"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Table Migration Check"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Acid Table Conversions"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Conversion Table Directories"
end section

section "Pre Upgrade Compaction"
    note right of Admin
        This process should be run several days
        BEFORE the actual upgrade to reduce the downtime of the upgrade.
        And should be run just BEFORE the upgrade and
        AFTER all users have been cleared from the system
        to ensure no tables are modified after this runs.
    end note
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Acid Table Compaction Check"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Acid Table Compaction Required"
    Admin -> Hive : TUNE THE COMPACTOR for estimated compaction needs
    Admin -> Hive : Run the compaction script. Break it apart if needed.
end section

section "Post Upgrade Planning"
    Admin -> Hive : Run "Acid Table Locations". Save artifact for Upgrade.
end section

section "Upgrade"
    Admin -> Sqoop : Review and Run ALL previous steps and collect details.
    Admin -> Ambari : Decision to intervene with Ambari Process based on volumes indicated through research
    Admin -> Ambari : Hack Pre/Post Processes
    Admin -> Ambari : Run Compaction Routine one last time.
    Admin -> Ambari : Start Upgrade
    Admin -> Ambari : Run the Post Upgrade Planning Output to convert tables.
    Admin -> Ambari : Complete Upgrade
end section

@enduml
